ops.body: Root cause correction after empirical re-triage (2026-07-19): the v14.4.0-push Documentation failure is NOT (only) the docs/release race. gd-build fails on `Word` because great-docs.yml:210 (committed in 5050c97, the 14.3.0 synthetic lineage) references a symbol whose pyo3 registration (`m.add_class::<command::WordView>()` in rust/crates/py/src/views/mod.rs) is still UNCOMMITTED WIP in the concurrent session's working tree — verified: the committed source has no runtime reference to Word (command.py clean; published 14.4.0 wheel imports fine, no consumer impact), and a clean local build of the tagged source lacks Word in _native exactly like the wheel. Docs stay deterministically red until that session lands the WordView registration + a release carries it. The race fix in this task's description is still worth doing, but rerunning docs will NOT go green for 14.4.x until the Word WIP ships. Deliberately not fixed forward from this session — the owning session has the fix in flight on those exact lines.
